title: Sneaky Link
description: Players can pick up items from below while crouching.
body:
## Overview

This is a very simple QoL mod, with one feature: players are capable of collecting item entities from under them while sneaking. This is meant to provide utility for breaking blocks while building.

Personally, I find this nice when dismantling temporary bridges and digging up irrigation lines.


## Config

You can change the radius, depth, and height from which sneaking players can pick up item entities. By default, the radius is set to 3 blocks away, and the depth is set to 2 blocks (height is set to 0). All three values are capped at 8.0 to minimize potential lag.

Players also have the option to ignore an item entity's pickup delay (which would ordinarily prevent them from immediately picking up items that they just dropped) when sneaking.


---
The credit for this mod goes entirely to Zym!

Feel free to direct any suggestions and bugs to the [issue tracker](https://github.com/davidjjung/sneakylink/issues)!
